contentDescriptions.description: Investigate and apply design thinking processes to identify needs and opportunities, generate and evaluate design ideas, and plan and produce solutions.
Select and use appropriate materials, components and tools, and evaluate their suitability for different design challenges.
Investigate how data is represented and structured in digital systems, and how algorithms are used to solve problems.
Apply computational thinking skills including decomposition, pattern recognition, abstraction and algorithm design to solve problems.
Design and implement algorithms using programming constructs including variables, selection, iteration and modular programming.
Analyse and evaluate the security and privacy implications of digital systems and develop strategies to manage risk.
